errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid e-mail address
errors.connection: Could not reach the server. Please check your connection.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

connect.title: Connect to your server
connect.subtitle: Hivora is self-hosted. Enter the URL of your organization's Hivora server to get started.
connect.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid http(s) URL
connect.failed: Could not connect to this server. Please verify the URL.

setup.title: Set up your server
setup.subtitle: This server hasn't been configured yet. Create the organization and the first administrator account.

projects.title: Projects
projects.body: Organize your efforts and track issues on your own terms — with custom workflows per project.

time.title: Time Tracking
time.body: Monitor and report time spent on different projects and various activity types.

gantt.title: Gantt Charts
gantt.body: Create and update your project plans on an interactive timeline with dependencies.

timesheets.title: Timesheets
timesheets.body: Track work activity for yourself and the members of your team, week by week.

boards.title: Agile Boards
boards.body: Plan and prioritize your development on a board that mirrors your team's process.

reports.title: Reports
reports.body: Collect and summarize insightful bits of information about your projects.

dashboards.title: Dashboards
dashboards.body: Monitor activity in all of your projects at a glance — tasks, progress and performance.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.body: Build a collection of articles that cover everything your team needs to know.

auth.subtitle: Sign in to continue
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed attempts. Please try again later.

update.title: Update required
update.body: Your app version {{current}} is older than the minimum version {{required}} required by this server. Please update the app to continue.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your day at a glance
dashboard.noTasks: No urgent tasks for today — enjoy!
dashboard.noRanking: No resolved issues in the last 30 days yet.

issues.title: Title
issues.deleteBody: {{id}} will be permanently deleted, including comments and work items.

projects.title: Projects
projects.empty: No projects yet. Create the first one!
projects.name: Project name
projects.keyHelp: Short code used for issue IDs, e.g. ASTA → ASTA-42

gantt.title: Gantt
gantt.empty: No scheduled issues. Set start and due dates on issues to see them on the timeline.

timesheet.title: Timesheet
timesheet.empty: No work items recorded in this week.

reports.title: Reports
reports.empty: No data for this report yet.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.empty: No articles yet. Share your team's knowledge!

admin.title: Admin area
admin.subtitle: Server settings take effect immediately — no restart required.
admin.ssoHint: Connect your identity provider (e.g. Synology SSO via OpenID Connect or SAML).
admin.emailIngestHint: Polls an IMAP mailbox and turns new e-mails into issues.
admin.secretHint: Leave blank to keep the stored value
